creator: scott+ports@sabami.seaslug.org
text:
I'm not familiar with the CONFLICTS var, but assuming someone familiar with that mechanism reviews
this, I'm fine with it.

Scott (nmh port maintainer)

On Wed, Feb 21, 2007 at 07:00:42PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/nmh,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/109401 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109401
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
